name: 7.8"x5.8" Glass Vase - Threshold™: Contemporary Cylindrical, Tabletop Decor, Watertight
description: Add a simple style to your home decor with this 6" x 7" Glass Vase from Threshold™. This contemporary cylindrical vase makes a welcoming tabletop accent. It features a clear glass finish that easily coordinates with any decor. This elegant piece looks good filled with flowers, vase fillers, pebbles or potpourri for countless decorating possibilities. Set it atop your mantelpiece, console table, sideboard or shelf with other accent pieces and spot clean when needed.
